description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a blue exterior and a large, steeply pitched brown gable roof. The house features a prominent brick chimney rising along one side, and several rectangular windows with white framing distributed across all visible facades. There is a small covered porch at the main entrance, supported by simple posts, and a secondary side extension with its own sloped roof. The roof includes dormer windows, adding architectural interest and likely providing light to the upper floor. The overall design is simple and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A blue two-story house with a steep brown gable roof, brick chimney, white-framed windows, and a small covered porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch, three tall windows, and the full height of the brick chimney.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the chimney's position, and the side extension with its own roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two dormer windows on the roof, two tall windows, and the porch roof over the main entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back door, additional porch, and the chimney extending above the roofline.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple covered porch with a single door, supported by posts and a small overhang.
